title: dillwynia prostrata
intro: Dillwynia prostrata, also known as the prostrate dillwynia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. It is native to Australia and is often found in open woodlands and grasslands. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been used to treat a range of health issues, including wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory problems. The leaves and flowers of the plant can be used in herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, to promote wound healing and reduce inflammation.
